top_comments.text: Bhaiya baaki sab sahi hai, bas ek problem lagi mujhe.... Load bearing parts ko kabhi bhi standing orientation mein print nahi karna chahiye, especially in FDM process. Aapka print stronger hoga agar aap use side waale orientation mein print karenge. When torque will be in the plane of printing (XY) to aap koi bhi material use karo, the part's strength is only 50% of material's strength. Either way, good video. 😊

top_comments.author: @pratikppm
top_comments.text: Almost all the hobby grade RC car sellers are scammers on amazon. First I ordered a 1:14 size car with Bldc motor for 7999 for which the sent a 1:18 size car with brushed motor and it wasn't even working. After returning it I ordered a 1:14 size car with brushed motor and instead of it I actually got a glass jar. The next cheapest option was the tygatech. I ordered from the seller directly. It was a legit car although the config was average.

channel_about:
Proud Indian in China 🇮🇳🇨🇳

 I'm Niranjan, a proud Indian living in the vibrant and diverse country of China. Join me on my journey as I explore the rich culture, unique traditions, and everyday life in China through the eyes of an Indian expat.
On this channel, you'll find:

🏵️Cultural Exchange:  Insights into the fascinating blend of Indian and Chinese cultures.
🪂Travel Adventures:  Discovering hidden gems and popular destinations across China.

🌶️Food and Cuisine:  Tasting and reviewing authentic Chinese dishes and sharing Indian recipes.
🧑‍🏫Language and Learning:   My experiences learning Mandarin and tips for fellow learners.

📸Daily Vlogs:  A glimpse into my daily life.

Subscribe to join my adventures, learn more about China, and celebrate the beautiful fusion of Indian and Chinese cultures. Let's bridge the gap and build understanding together!

☎️ For call please book appointment on www.niranjanchina.com
      collaboration: infoniranjanchina@gmail.com

channel_about:
Welcome to Industrial Craft! We are interested in the TECH that rewired human behavior!

We will tell you the stories of how some of our most beloved tech like the gameboy or the walkman fundamentally changed how we maneuver through society. 

Stick around and find some of our original content about toy manufacturing and product creation. This channel brings you up close with innovative production methods and timeless crafting techniques. From precision toymaking to cutting-edge automation, woodworking to nostalga electronics, and everything in between, Industrial Craft dives deep into the processes that shape the modern world. Subscribe now and discover the artistry and technology behind the products you use every day.

videos.title: How RC Cars Are Made in Factory | The Engineering Behind High-Speed Mini Machines
videos.description:
RC cars aren’t just toys—they’re high-performance machines built for speed, power, and durability. From off-road beasts that tear through dirt to lightning-fast drift racers, these vehicles are engineered for extreme action. But how do they go from design sketches to fully functional remote-controlled cars? In this video, we’ll take you inside the entire manufacturing process—from chassis construction and motor installation to precision painting and final assembly. Get ready to see what makes RC cars so fast, tough, and thrilling to drive!

#rccars #rccar

videos.title: 16th Toy Biz International Expo देखिए Direct Company से डील कैसे करे | Toy Expo 2025 Pragati Maidan
videos.description:
Toy Biz B2B International Expo 2025 brings together manufacturers, traders, and end users of toys to foster good business relations through B2B, and delegations from several countries visit the fair for trade promotion. Over 500 Indian brands are displayed with major product profiles such as children's products, puzzles & board games, traditional toys, soft/plush toys, kids' cradles, sports goods, educational toys, etc. in this event.
We covered as many brands as possible and have shared their business requirements, contact details, and more. You can connect with them to enter a toy business or expand your existing one. So watch the video till the end to learn more.

Toy Biz International Expo 2025
Date: 4th, 5th, 6th & 7th July 2025

Entry: Free To All

channel_about:
Aditi Toys, a pioneering Made in India toys manufacturer, has earned its reputation in the toy manufacturing industry by crafting high-quality, innovative, and safe toys that inspire joy and creativity.

As a toy brand in India with years of expertise and state-of-the-art facilities, we specialize in turning imagination into reality. From concept to creation, every toy we make is a reflection of our commitment to precision, craftsmanship, and excellence.

Our products, includes plastic, Die Cast, Bubbles , Electrical and wooden toys in India and bio-degradable toys, are designed to bring smiles to children worldwide — while adhering to the highest global standards of safety, sustainability, and innovation.

videos.title: India’s Largest Toy Factory | Aditi Toys – Leading Indian Toy Manufacturer & Exporter
videos.description:
Welcome to Aditi Toys Pvt. Ltd., one of India’s largest toy manufacturing facilities, where we design, develop, and produce high-quality toys 100% in-house. As a leading Indian toy manufacturer and exporter, we specialize in wooden toys, plastic toys, die-cast cars, dart guns, electric toys, magnetic toys, silicone toys, and more, all crafted with precision and international safety standards.

🚀 Why Aditi Toys?
✔ State-of-the-art in-house manufacturing facility
✔ Advanced machinery & cutting-edge technology
✔ Over 200+ toy products designed for global markets
✔ Exporting to the USA, Europe, and worldwide

🔍 Searching for a trusted toy supplier from India? Look no further! Watch our full factory tour and discover why global importers and retailers choose Aditi Toys.

top_comments.author: @Gab2456_
top_comments.text:
I would love to buy one of these if they fix the Chassis and Differentials, the differencials dont last anything. They only las 2 runs because they dont place grease in them, they only place a teeny tiny drop in there. They could easily use Silicon Earplugs or even Differential Grease, which is basically thick oil and help the diffs take a beating. They only cost 2$ to 3 for a massive bottle of grease. 

And then the chassis bends relatively easily and can even break and take out some of the center driveshafts with the flex that it has since they didnt place a chassis brace from each the front or the back. 

If they fix all of those issues and come with a V2 of the 10th scale cars I'll be sure to buy one from their store, but other than that, they offer incredible value, great parts support and price.

videos.title: Toy Biz Expo 2025 International | India’s Largest Toy Fair at Pragati Maidan Delhi | Toy Exhibition!
videos.description:
🎉 TOY BIZ EXPO 2025 - INDIA’S BIGGEST B2B TOY FAIR 🎉
📍 Pragati Maidan, New Delhi | 🗓️ 4th - 7th July 2025 | 🕙 10 AM to 6 PM
🎟️ Entry: FREE | 🚇 Nearest Metro: Supreme Court Station
🚪 Entry Gate: 10-4

The Toy Association of India proudly presents the Toy Biz International Expo 2025 — India’s leading B2B expo for toys and child-related products! This mega event brings together toy manufacturers, wholesalers, distributors, traders, and global buyers under one roof at Pragati Maidan, Delhi.

🔹 Explore the vibrant world of the Indian toy industry
🔹 Discover the latest in electric toy bikes, electric toy cars, and toy-making machines
🔹 Network with top toy dealers, exporters, and retailers
🔹 Dive into the heart of the toy wholesale market in Delhi

Whether you're in the business of toy manufacturing or sourcing child products, Toy Biz Expo 2025 is your gateway to new opportunities.

📞 Join us and become a part of India’s growing toy ecosystem!

👉 Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more updates from the world of toys.

videos.title: Inside China’s Biggest Toys Market 🤯 Yiwu Wholesale Tour
videos.description:
Welcome to Yiwu, China – the world’s largest wholesale toys market! 🎉
In this video, I take you on a full Yiwu Market Tour, showing you how toys are sold in bulk, where shopkeepers display thousands of items, and how importers from Pakistan, India, Bangladesh, and around the world do business here.

Yiwu International Trade Market is known as the “World’s Factory for Small Commodities”, and its toys section is one of the biggest attractions. Whether you want to start an import business or just explore China’s wholesale culture, this video is packed with insights.

👉 What you will see in this video:

A walk through Yiwu Toys Wholesale Market 🇨🇳

Shops selling airplanes, dolls, puzzles, cars, and games 🧸

Wholesale prices and amazing variety for kids’ toys 🎮

Factory business cards for direct sourcing & bulk orders 🏭

How traders from Pakistan, India, Bangladesh, and Middle East buy toys

A look at how Yiwu became China’s largest toys market

📌 If you’re interested in importing toys from China to Pakistan, India, or Bangladesh, this vlog will give you real market exposure and ideas to start your business.

Yiwu Market is not just for toys – it’s a huge marketplace with every product you can imagine, but in this video we’re focused on toys wholesale so you get a clear picture of opportunities in this business.

💡 Why Watch This Video?

To understand how Yiwu toy wholesale works

To explore cheap wholesale toys in China

To get tips for new importers and business owners

To see the real Yiwu Market experience through my camera 🎥

We wish to introduce ourselves as a leading manufacturer of Wooden Educational Toys, Games and Puzzles in India located at TOY CITY Greater Noida. Little Genius Toys Pvt. Ltd. is an eco-friendly; Indian based wooden toy company that specializes in the design and manufacturing of wooden educational toys.

We develop educational toys to provide educators with a comprehensive and effective means of transmitting information and to help modernize educational methods.

That children are highly receptive and stimulated to learn through the usage of wooden educational toys, is widely accepted by educators throughout the field. We developed and continue to develop more and more new products those are related to the educational toys and games and Montessori school products.

Today we have wide range of wooden toys products list covering toys, jigsaw, building blocks and lot more.

These toys can be used for both, children with special needs and others for development of brain power and for hand/eye coordination.

videos.title: Exploring China’s Biggest Toys Market 😱 REVEALING The prices - Yiwu International Trade City | Hindi
videos.description:
📍 Exploring China’s Biggest Toys Market – Yiwu International Trade City 🇨🇳 | RC Cars, Prices & Wholesale Toys Tour

Welcome to one of the largest wholesale toys markets in the world – the Yiwu International Trade Center (also known as Yiwu Market), located in Zhejiang Province, China. 

In this detailed vlog, I take you on a complete tour of the toys section where you’ll find RC cars, educational toys, plush toys, dolls, plastic toys, electronic toys, and much more – all at factory-direct prices!

✅ What's in the video?

📌 Real-time prices of popular toys
📌 High-quality RC cars & trucks
📌 Latest electronic and remote control toys
📌 Wholesale & retail buying options
📌 Contact details (where permitted)
📌 Business tips for toy importers & resellers
📌 Bargaining tips inside Yiwu market
📌 Exploring different halls & suppliers

🧸 Toy Categories Covered:
Remote Control (RC) Cars & Drones
Battery-operated Cars
Barbie dolls 
Kids’ Educational Toys
Doll Houses & Plush Toys
Building Blocks & Puzzles
Plastic & Rubber Toys
Wholesale Action Figures
Toy Guns, Trains, Planes & More!

🎯 Why Watch This Video?
Whether you're a toys business owner, a dropshipper, a retailer, or just someone curious about the China wholesale market, this video gives you authentic insight into the scale, quality, and pricing of toys at Yiwu Toy Market. 

I also share tips on how to deal with suppliers, MOQ (minimum order quantity), and shipping options.

📌 About Yiwu International Trade City:

videos.title: Inside a High-End RC Car Factory – Full Remote Control Car Production Process.
videos.description:
Step inside a modern toy factory and watch the full production process of high-end RC cars from start to finish. In this cinematic factory tour, you’ll see how plastic shells, electronic components and precision parts come together to create premium remote control cars.

In this documentary-style video, we follow the RC car manufacturing process step by step:

Designing the RC car body, chassis and internal layout

Injection molding of plastic bodies, chassis and small components

Painting, clear coating and detailed printing for realistic car bodies

Assembling electric motors, gearboxes, suspension and steering systems

Installing PCBs, receivers, speed controllers, LEDs and batteries

Mounting wheels, tires and body shells onto the chassis

Pairing each car with its remote controller and testing signal range

Performance testing: speed, steering, braking and durability checks

Final quality control, cleaning and premium packaging for shipping

If you love RC cars, radio control toys, factory tours, electronics manufacturing or you’re curious how your favorite remote control cars are made, this video is for you. Enjoy the satisfying scenes of assembly lines, tiny parts snapping together and rows of finished RC cars being tested before they leave the factory.

channel_about:
Ever wondered how everyday things are actually made inside real factories? How It’s Made – Factories takes you behind the scenes of massive production plants to reveal the complete step-by-step manufacturing process. From raw materials to finished products, watch machines, robots, and skilled workers transform simple components into items we use daily.

Each episode shows:
• Real factory footage
• Step-by-step production process
• Close-up machine operations
• Industrial technology & automation
• Satisfying assembly lines

Perfect for students, engineering lovers, and curious minds who enjoy learning how things are created in the real world.

Injection molding

Packaging and shipping

https://youtu.be/jJR3q9HAvh0

**************
Welcome to another exciting episode of "The Rahul Malodia", where we talk about private labelling a smart business strategy that lets you build your own brand without owning a factory!

In this video, we’ll talk about how to create a strong brand that stands out from the crowd and why picking the right type of business is so important for long-term success. From furniture and food to cosmetics and construction, you’ll learn how growing cities are creating big opportunities for private label businesses in India.

Here’s what you’ll learn:
🔹What is private labeling?
🔹Benefits of Private labeling 
🔹How to increase sales of your existing products?
🔹How to find great business ideas? 
🔹Why is cosmetics a fast-growing and profitable private label business?
🔹How companies are making money without making their own products?
🔹Creative and smart ways to beat the competition.
🔹How to start a food business?
🔹How to start a clothing business?
🔹How to start a Furniture business?

If you want to start your own brand or want to know how big companies make money behind the scenes, this episode is full of useful tips you don’t want to miss!
Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more content on business and financial growth!

videos.title: Inside One of the World's Largest RC Companies!
videos.description:
What does it look like inside one of the biggest radio control companies in the world? While visiting Texas, we stopped in at Traxxas Headquarters to check out their retail shop and chat with Marketing Director Damron Atkins! All the Traxxas vehicles are designed, tested, and distributed from their massive warehouse in McKinney, Texas. 

Their retail store is open to the public Monday through Friday and is stocked with every single model and product they make. Looking for parts? They have one for every one of their RCs. 

Huge thank  you to them for lending out a bunch of sick vehicles for our shoot at a Priority Tire warehouse (next video!!). 

Location:
Traxxas Headquarters
6250 Traxxas Way
McKinney, TX 75070

top_comments.author: @LoneWolf-479
top_comments.text: I'll never forget late summer of 2005. I lived in a small town & was bored to death having lived in the country all my life. Bought a nitro S-Maxx, & everytime I got it out, kids would hear it & run outside like it was the ice cream truck. That November several of the parents were asking me which one to get them for x-mas.  The first warm wknd in January i quickly learned that Santa had dropped off 6 other rc cars/trucks on our block. We all had an absolute blast.

top_comments.author: @aguyinnc2865
top_comments.text: It's probably a good thing I don't live near there! I have four Slashes, two set up for Mudboss, 13.5 and 12T, one set up for Street Stock (or Super Street,) and a first Gen Raptor Slash. I also have a 4-Tec 2.0 Mustang. I raced Stock Slash on our local oval a couple of years ago, and won the points championship. Fun vehicles, love the support from Traxxas, especially the availability of parts. I DO wish, they would re release the SRT Stadium Truck, or offer the body and wheels to build a SRT Rustler. Not much crawling action in my area, but would love to have one of their Broncos. And more Slashes, don't have a 4WD yet. Btw I am 67 years old, got into RC back in '89, have raced oval for years, not as good on off road or road course. Haven't raced in a couple of years, hoping somebody would set up a new track nearby!

top_comments.text: We don’t have anything like this in the UK! Watching this, I’ve realised I’ve never seen something like it before. videos.title: Inside the Toy Factory Making RC Cars | Factory Lens
videos.description:
Ever wondered how RC cars are made?

In this video, we take you inside a toy manufacturing factory to explore the complete production process of remote control cars. Watch how wheels, motors, batteries, and plastic parts are assembled using conveyor belts, robotic machines, and skilled workers.

From injection molding to final assembly and testing, see how thousands of RC cars are mass produced every day in this satisfying factory documentary.

If you enjoy “how it’s made” and factory process videos, subscribe for more industrial and toy manufacturing content.

#RCCars #ToyFactory #HowItsMade #Manufacturing #FactoryProcess

videos.title: Toy Biz Expo 2025  | India’s Biggest Toy Exhibition | International Toy Exhibition at Pragati Maidan
videos.description:
Toy Biz Expo 2025  | India’s Biggest Toy Exhibition | International Toy Exhibition at Pragati Maidan
📍 Toy Biz International Expo 2025
📍 Venue: Pragati Maidan, New Delhi, India 🇮🇳
Welcome to Toy Biz Expo 2025, India’s most creative and innovative toy exhibition showcasing the future of toys, education, and imagination. This event brings together top Indian & global toy manufacturers, educational toy creators, and sustainable play innovators.
In this video, explore the latest toy trends, STEM-based learning products, and make-in-India toy brands that are shaping the next generation of play.
✨ Brands Featured in this Video:
Blue Bells – Innovative toys inspiring young minds
Lomaa Products – Premium soft toys & BIS certified creations
Manico Toys – Educational & fun products for all age groups
Re Play – Sustainable toys made from recycled materials
Kinder Creative – India’s leading educational toy brand
Star Toys – Trendy kids’ toys & accessories
Toys Plus – Made in India toy innovation brand
Veer Harman Ventures – Premium Stationary  solutions for all categories
Mirana Toys – High-quality plastic & educational toys
Mr. Blox – Modular creative building blocks for kids
UA Toys – Fun-filled entertainment toys
Just Party – Party toys & decor essentials
Hookaba – Custom-designed plush toys
Pamme – Creative children’s toys & accessories
Butterfly Edufields – STEM learning toys that spark curiosity
🎯 Toy Biz Expo 2025 is a hub for manufacturers, distributors, and retailers to connect, innovate, and explore the booming toy market in India.

Aaj finally leke aayi hoon aapko ek proper wholesale bag tour from one of Mumbai’s biggest bag manufacturers!
If you’re shopping for the wedding season, potlis, clutches, fabric envelopes, purses, mobile holders, jewellery organisers, saree organisers, bangle boxes, vanity kits, watch box… literally EVERYTHING is here.

Aur second half of the video → full tour of ALL their bag categories: backpacks, sling bags, Tote bags, Laptop bags, men’s bags, kids bags, tiffin bags, bottle covers, duffel bags, luggage… you name it, they have it!

Perfect for bulk buying, gifting, wedding packing, corporate gifting and resellers.

videos.description:
Toy Biz International Expo 2024 | South Asia's Largest Toy Fair | Profitable Business Opportunities
#toys #jodioncamera 

Toy Biz B2B International Expo 2024 brings together manufacturers, traders, and end users of toys to foster good business relations through B2B, and delegations from several countries visit the fair for trade promotion. Over 350 Indian brands are displayed with major product profiles such as children's products, puzzles & board games, traditional toys, soft/plush toys, kids' cradles, sports goods, educational toys, etc. in this event.
We covered as many brands as possible and have shared their business requirements, contact details, and more. You can connect with them to enter a toy business or expand your existing one. So watch the video till the end to learn more.

This Video will introduce you to the China Yiwu  toys market, also known as Yiwu toys wholesale market, located in the Yiwu market.

Yiwu Toys Market is the largest wholesale toys marketplace in China. Toys are also one of the strongest industries of Yiwu.

videos.title: Masjid Bandar Wholesale Market | मस्जिद बंदर होलसेल मार्केट 😍 | Mumbai Masjid Bunder Market 😍
videos.description:
LIKE | SHARE | SUBSCRIBE

Join us on a fascinating journey through Mumbai's bustling Masjid Bunder Wholesale Market! In this video, we'll take you on a visual tour of one of the city's most vibrant and historic marketplaces.

Masjid Bunder Wholesale Market is a bustling hub for traders, wholesalers, and buyers from all over the city. Located in the heart of Mumbai, this market is known for its diverse range of products, from textiles and spices to electronics and stationery. It's a paradise for bargain hunters and a testament to the city's thriving commercial spirit.

During our visit, we'll explore the narrow lanes filled with shops and stalls, where you'll find everything from traditional Indian fabrics to the latest gadgets at wholesale prices. We'll also introduce you to some of the friendly local vendors who make this market come alive with their unique offerings.

Whether you're a local resident or a visitor to Mumbai, Masjid Bunder Wholesale Market is a must-visit destination that offers a glimpse into the city's rich trading heritage. So, sit back, relax, and immerse yourself in the sights and sounds of this incredible market.

Don't forget to hit the "Like" button and subscribe to our channel for more exciting travel and exploration videos. Join us on this adventure and let's discover Masjid Bunder Wholesale Market together!

channel_about:
Nature, Architecture and Divine are the three aspects around which our daily lives revolve.

This channel aims to bring forth the essence of all the three through shorts depicting the architectural beauties, travel spots, spiritual places, culturally rich alleys & places of historical significance.

Join me on the journey to uncover the hidden gems of nature & architecture in and around our cities of India.

New YouTube shorts are posted on the channel everyday (Usually After 11.30 A.M.).

Please do like,share, subscribe and comment on my videos, if you like my content.

Do check the written posts for more detailed information about the YouTube Shorts posted everyday.

Look out for a "Special YouTube Short" listing the places visited during the week every Saturday (by 8.45 A.M.) other than the shorts  posted everyday on the channel (Usually Five YouTube Shorts per day).

Thank you, God bless You all!

videos.title: Lohar Chawl, South Mumbai.
videos.description:
This is the Famous Lohar Chawl market.

It is located in Kalbadevi Area (Near Dhobitalao, Marine Lines, South Mumbai) & Near Crawford Market ( Now known as Mahatma Phule Market).

It is a wholesale market that caters to all the electrical needs such as bulbs,fans,lights, switches, electrical cables etc.

Prices here are very affordable, it attracts crowds from all over the city for the same.

The nearest stations are Marine Lines on the Western line and C.S.M.T on the central Line of Mumbai.

videos.title: Bhajipala Street, Nagdevi Street Cross Lane, Mohammed Ali Road, South Mumbai. #mohammedaliroad
videos.description:
This is the Bhajipala Lane, Nagdevi Cross Lane, Near Mohammed Ali Road, South Mumbai.

If you are looking for a market just for plumbing needs, this is the lane that will fulfill all the needs.

The fact that it is very accessible from the main road makes it the best entry point to the Nagdevi market if you are new to the area.

It is sort of a hacking trick to enter the market as the lane connects upto Sarang Street and Abdul Rehman Street as well.

Try avoiding peak hours or weekends if possible to avoid massive rush as it is very difficult to navigate on your two wheeler during these times.

videos.title: interior design lohar chawl home decor wholesale lights bmc
videos.description:
interior design lohar chawl home decor wholesale lights bmc

@IndiaAmazing @AamchiMumbai @WholesaleMarket @WholesaleTed @lightboi @MumbaiTak @HomeDepot 

Lohar Chawl, Kalbadevi, Mumbai

Lohar Chawl, the most underrated wholesale market for lighting in the city is where you need to be next weekend. We found really fancy lights (only those you could have dreamt of), to add the right amount of zing to your home. This list couldn't have come in at a better time, it's Diwali folks! Remember, bargaining just the right amount is the way to shop here. So buckle in and read on but also head on over to shop to your heart's content!

Rope Light
If you're someone who loves being in lowly-lit places, this lamp is for you. The rope gives it a grungy, rough-around-the-edges look and the bulb provides the right amount of light needed to space out at night. Don't forget to take your haggling skills with you. Even before we could begin, the shopkeeper informed us about a perennial 40% on certain items. 

Haggle-Shaggle: Original price was INR 4,000 but we got it for INR 2,400.

Cane Bookshelf Lamp
We couldn't get our eyes off this cane lamp-cum-bookshelf, and that's when we realized what love at first sight actually was. Lightweight, easy to transport and most importantly durable- we couldn't think twice before buying it!

Haggle-Shaggle: Original price was INR 5,000 but we got it for INR 4,000.

Floor Lamp
A tripod-style floor lamp, this one’s ideal for those who love the big movie-style lights. Ideal for creating that cosy corner with a bookshelf in tow.

Haggle-Shaggle: Pitched at 13,200, we grabbed it for INR 9,850.

Magnifying Glass Lamp
If you are a sucker for detailing, this super cool lamp with a magnifying glass must be on your side table, Other than being uber cool, it is also very light to carry around.

Haggle-Shaggle: INR 500 is what the guy asked for: we got it down to INR 400.

Masonic Love
Too bored of milkshakes and mojitos in a mason jar? This colorful mason jar chandelier will definitely change your mind about them. They're just perfect to add a pop of color over your dining table or the stairs leading up to your room too. 

Haggle-Shaggle: Our heart skipped a beat {literally} when the sales person said it was for INR 49,750 but we got it down to INR 25,000 (it's a chandelier, guys).

Fairy Lights
Where do we even start with the blessing that fairy lights are for those who like to keep it simple and cheap? But durability is an issue with the ones you find at your local electrical shop. Lohar Chawl has quality fairy and LED lights, not the ones with flimsy wires, but the real deal.

Haggle-Shaggle: INR 100 per metre for fairy lights, INR 50 for LED strips. We didn’t feel like haggling for this one.

Psst...you can check out here some string lights from Amazon that are simply amazing!

Dance Dance
Turn your bedroom into a dance floor with these awesome tripped-out dance lights available at INR 1,000. These lights will take you from ‘Let’s go out dancing tonight’ to ‘Let’s stay in and dance’ within seconds.

Haggle-Shaggle: The guy can come down to INR 900 or INR 850 max, but we think these lights were a steal anyway!

Bulbception
What if we told you that we found Edison and Christopher Nolan’s love child at this shop? A bulb inside a bulb is pure genius in terms of design {the light fell beautifully} and that quirk factor that it comes with. Available at INR 1,500 per piece, you can mix up different colours and shapes and create something of your own.

Haggle Shaggle: The price will come down if you buy in bulk.

Pro-Tip
Carry your sunglasses and haggling skills with you. We also chanced upon some shops in between selling amazing kitchen utilities {glass containers, kettles and even chutney holders}.

channel_about:
RC Warrior – More Than Just Remote Control
Welcome to RC Warrior, where imagination meets innovation! This is not just about RC cars — it's about creating joy, sparking curiosity, and making everyday moments unforgettable.

Watch our unique RC vehicles do the unexpected: from buying beach snacks to delivering surprises — all with speed, style, and a sprinkle of fun!

Our mission? To turn tiny wheels into big smiles. Subscribe and ride along with us as we redefine what RC cars can do!

Do subscribe for more videos. 
For promotion and Collab : srcwarriorteam2025@gmail.com

videos.title: Crawford Market Tour - Mumbai’s Biggest Wholesale Market  | Curly Tales
videos.description:
Crawford Market is a popular spot for buying all the household items. Whether you are planning on buying vegetables or poultry, then Crawford Market is the place to be. Crawford Market was the main wholesale market till 1966. Spanning around 72000 sq. yards, this market is also famous for its splendid architecture. Norman and Flemish styles can be seen in the architecture, depicting elements of the old-world charm in a modern city. This place is a shopper’s delight!

For a similar video, check out:  https://bit.ly/2N5427W 

#CurlyTales #TravelTales #CurlyTalesMumbai

top_comments.author: @jpathak6227
top_comments.text: I was there with my wife not long ago. We really enjoyed walking around there and shopping. We were so amazed at the art of bargaining. Many Europeans, Aussies and Americans were there shopping. We were told not to be embarrassed for making a deal. Remember the guy asking 400.00 rupees for something my wife fancied. Started walking and he called out to us. After some haggling he settled for 75 rupees that is a shade over $1.28. It was fun.

videos.title: Crawford Market Shopping 2026 | Caps ₹10, Cupboards ₹2500 & Festive Deals | Wholesale Market Mumbai
videos.description:
Crawford Market Christmas Shopping | Budget Christmas Decor, Santa Caps ₹10, Trees ₹2500
Get ready for a full Christmas shopping tour at Mumbai’s famous Crawford Market. In this video, I explore the best budget Christmas decorations, cheap festive finds, and season special deals you can grab right now. From Santa caps for just ₹10 to Christmas ornaments for ₹50, and 5 ft Christmas trees for ₹2500, this is the ultimate guide for affordable festive shopping in Mumbai.
Whether you’re looking for Christmas lights, Santa figurines, gift boxes, home decor, or unique festive items, Crawford Market has everything at unbelievable prices. I walk through the busiest lanes, compare prices, show product quality, and give you a real street-shopping experience.
What You’ll See in This Video:
• Best Christmas decorations at Crawford Market
• Santa caps for ₹10
• Christmas ornaments for ₹50
• 5 ft Christmas tree for ₹2500
• Festive string lights, bells, wreaths, and more
• Honest review of product quality
• Real street-shopping experience in Mumbai
• Tips on where to buy and how to bargain
Keywords:
Crawford Market Christmas Shopping, Christmas Shopping Mumbai, Crawford Market Decor, Santa Cap ₹10, Christmas Tree Mumbai, Budget Christmas Shopping, Mumbai Street Shopping, Crawford Market Guide, Festive Shopping Mumbai, Christmas Decorations India, Christmas Market Tour, Mumbai Christmas Vlog, Affordable Christmas Decor.
If you find this video helpful, make sure to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more Mumbai markets, food tours, and budget shopping guides.

top_comments.author: @vlogging-nauk
top_comments.text: I have been to Crawford Market many times, and it is always a great experience! The market is full of energy, variety, and amazing options for shopping. You can find almost everything here—from fresh fruits and vegetables to clothes, accessories, and household items—all at very reasonable and affordable prices. It’s one of the best places in Mumbai for budget shopping. The lively atmosphere and vibrant vibe make every visit enjoyable. Truly a fantastic place where quality and affordability come together!” 🛍✨

Welcome to the Ultimate guide to Mumbai’s hidden markets! I’m Seema Pandey, your go-to explorer for the "most affordable, unique, and trending" shopping spots across Mumbai. From bustling street bazaars to secret thrift finds, I bring you "budget-friendly fashion, authentic local crafts, and unbeatable deals" that you won’t find anywhere else.  


🔎 Discover: Mumbai’s cheapest shopping streets, wholesale markets, and quirky bargain hotspots.  

💰 Shop Smart: Insider tips on negotiating, finding the best prices, and shopping hacks.

Hit "Subscribe" and join me in uncovering Mumbai’s best-kept shopping secrets! 🛒✨

About Video - Lohar Chawl is a famous wholesale electronic market in Mumbai. It has many shops dealing with new and old electronics items, such as mobile phones, accessories, light fixtures, cables, wires, etc. You can find a variety of products at low prices, but you have to bargain well and be careful about the quality and authenticity of the items. Some of the popular shops in Lohar Chawl are. 

Lohar Chawl is located near Crawford Market in Kalbadevi area. It is open from 10 am to 10 pm every Monday to Saturday1. You can reach there by bus, train or taxi from any part of Mumbai.

I hope this information helps you. If you have any more questions, please feel free to ask me in video comment box.

videos.title: Toys Wholesale Market | Electronic Toys Market | Wholesale Toys | Wholesale Toys Market Yiwu China
videos.description:
Hello, everyone. I am sharing a Complete Tour of the world's largest wholesale markets in Yiwu, Zhejiang Province, China. This market is also called the Futian market. This market has five districts; each has 3 to 4 floors, and each floor has a different variety of Products. This is the world's largest wholesale market. Here, you can find more than 75000 suppliers. This video Part focuses on Toys products, Toys suppliers you can find out on district number two first floor of this markets.  There are thousands of suppliers available in this market. In this video, I am sharing different types toys such as electronic toys, soft toys, babies doll, Puzzles games toys, Board games, educational toys and many more  products and their estimated price in the Chinese currency Rmb market More parts will be coming soon. If you are interested in buying any product for your Business from this wholesale market, you can contact me at this email address:📩 kapsourcingmovers@gmail.com.

Exploring Mumbai's Famous Colaba Causeway Market | कोलाबा कॉझवे मार्केटची

Address- Arthur Bunder Rd, Cusrow Baug Colony, Apollo Bandar, Colaba, Mumbai- 400001

 Timing: 10 am to 9 pm

 This iconic market, located in the heart of Mumbai's Colaba neighborhood, has been a magnet for locals and tourists alike for decades. Colaba Causeway stretches along a bustling street, lined with a myriad of shops, stalls, and vendors, each offering a treasure trove of goods. From clothing and accessories to handicrafts and souvenirs, there's something here for everyone.
Thank you for joining us on this virtual tour of Colaba Causeway Market. Don't forget to hit the 'Like' button and subscribe to our channel.

Explore Lohar Chawl, Crawford Market, and Bhuleshwar Market — the go-to places for decorative lights, Diwali lighting, LED strips, chandeliers, and home décor items at wholesale prices! 😍

Lohar Chawl: Famous for all types of lighting & electricals

Welcome to one of Mumbai’s most iconic and bustling markets – Crawford Market (also known as Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandai)
